title: Cell Biology
subject: Science
description: Explore the building blocks of life — cell structure, function, and division.

title: Classical Mechanics
subject: Science
description: Newton's laws, kinematics, and the physics of everyday motion.

lessons.title: Work, Energy, and Power
lessons.content: Work is done when a force moves an object. W = F × d × cos(θ). Energy is the capacity to do work. Power is the rate of doing work: P = W/t.

title: Essay Writing
subject: English
description: Learn how to craft clear, compelling essays with strong arguments and evidence.

lessons.title: The Essay Structure
lessons.content: Every essay has three main parts: Introduction, Body, and Conclusion. The introduction presents your thesis, the body supports it with evidence, and the conclusion summarizes your argument.

lessons.title: Paragraph Structure
lessons.content: Use the PEEL method: Point, Evidence, Explanation, Link. Each paragraph should make one clear point, support it with evidence, explain the evidence, and link back to your thesis.

title: World War II
subject: History
description: Understand the causes, key events, and lasting impact of the Second World War.
